name: cutit-marketplace
description: Marketplace hosting the cutit family of plugins: Claude Code skills for cutting LLM token usage on agentic work without losing result quality. Install the all-in-one `cutit` plugin, or pick just the themed bundle(s) you need.

plugins.name: cutit
plugins.description: All 112 cutit skills bundled together: the core protocol plus every themed skill below. Simplest install, ~10k tokens always-on.

plugins.name: cutit-agents
plugins.description: 24 skills for building/orchestrating agent workflows: planning, sub-agent delegation, multi-agent pipelines.

plugins.name: cutit-tooling
plugins.description: 22 skills for tool use, retrieval/RAG, and prompt construction.

plugins.name: cutit-runtime
plugins.description: 42 skills for operating long-running agents: context/memory budgeting, sessions, error recovery, caching, state tracking, model routing, search strategy.

plugins.name: cutit-quality
plugins.description: 20 skills for correctness and output discipline: verification, human-in-the-loop, eval/guardrails, response-length discipline.

plugins.name: cutit-domains
plugins.description: 3 skills for frontend, backend, and design work.
